case_title: STEPHANIE HETTRICH VS. ODEON CLEOPE BRIONES

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HETTRICH, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT BRIONES, ODEON CLEOPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY KAPLAN. FILED BY HETTRICH, STEPHANIE BRIONES, ODEON CLEOPE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY P. KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING ON RECORD. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HETTRICH, STEPHANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRIONES, ODEON CLEOPE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
